entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species being studied for genetic diversity among maintainers and pollinators.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among the pearl millet lines.

entities.name: MICROSATELLITE MARKERS
entities.description: Molecular markers used to assess genetic diversity.

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT
entities.description: Another term for microsatellite markers, used for detecting alleles.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN
entities.description: Geographic origin of some of the pearl millet maintainers and pollinators.

entities.name: INDIAN
entities.description: Geographic origin of some of the pearl millet maintainers and pollinators.

entities.name: POLYMORPHIC INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A measure used to evaluate the informativeness of the SSR loci.

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUP
entities.description: Groups of genes or markers located on the same chromosome.

entities.name: GENETIC SIMILARITY
entities.description: The degree of genetic relatedness between the maintainer and pollinator lines.

entities.name: ICMR 356
entities.description: A specific pollinator line of pearl millet identified as a potential parent for hybrid development.

entities.name: HYBRID DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating hybrid pearl millet varieties.
